daily.use_case: Facebook/Instagram 경쟁사 광고 소재, 카피, 랜딩 흐름 확인
daily.codex_task: Search by brand, industry keywords, and product category. Save active ad copy, visual angle, CTA, landing page pattern.

daily.use_case: 숏폼 광고, 인기 해시태그, 후킹 문구, 우수 광고 구조 확인
daily.codex_task: Collect top ads by country, industry, objective, hashtag. Extract first 3 seconds hook, caption, format, CTA.

daily.use_case: 국내 마케팅 트렌드, 광고 사례, 실무 노하우 확인
daily.codex_task: Collect articles about Naver, Kakao, Google Ads, Meta, AI marketing, ecommerce. Summarize actionable points for agency AE.

daily.use_case: 국내 광고 실무자 커뮤니티, 네이버·메타·대행사 이슈 확인
daily.codex_task: Monitor hot posts and Q&A about ad operations. Extract issues, platform bugs, policy concerns, practical tips.
Collect major marketing/advertising articles. Summarize trend, affected industries, implications for performance marketing.

daily.use_case: 키워드 검색 관심도, 지역별 관심도, 급상승 검색어 확인
daily.codex_task: Track target keywords by country and time range. Save rising queries, breakout keywords, seasonality.

daily.use_case: 네이버 검색광고, 쇼핑광고, 브랜드검색, 플레이스광고, GFA 변경사항 확인
daily.codex_task: Check new notices daily. Extract product changes, policy updates, new metrics, schedule, advertiser impact.

daily.use_case: 글로벌 광고, 브랜드, 미디어, 테크 뉴스 확인
daily.codex_task: Collect top marketing/ad news. Extract brand case, campaign angle, platform implication.

daily.use_case: 브랜드 전략, 소셜미디어, 애드테크 뉴스 확인
daily.codex_task: Collect daily marketing news. Summarize platform changes, brand moves, social trends.

daily.use_case: SEO, PPC, Google Ads, AI 검색 변화 확인
daily.codex_task: Collect PPC and search news. Extract Google Ads changes, SEO/SEM implications, AI search updates.

daily.use_case: 검색, PPC, 소셜미디어, SEO 업데이트 확인
daily.codex_task: Monitor search and paid media articles. Extract tactical implications and recommended actions.

daily.use_case: Google Ads, Meta Ads, Microsoft Ads, Amazon Ads, TikTok Ads 실무자 토론 확인
daily.codex_task: Monitor hot posts. Extract recurring platform problems, tactic discussions, policy issues, practitioner sentiment.

daily.use_case: 글로벌 마케터, 애드테크 기업, 플랫폼 담당자 업데이트 확인
daily.codex_task: Follow selected industry leaders and adtech companies if access exists. Extract early interpretations and practitioner reactions.

weekly.use_case: Google/YouTube/Display 광고주 집행 소재 확인
weekly.codex_task: Search advertiser domains and brand names. Record ad format, last shown date, message angle, visual pattern.

weekly.use_case: 글로벌 광고 캠페인 이미지·영상 레퍼런스 확인
weekly.codex_task: Collect global campaign examples by industry. Summarize creative concept, key message, visual metaphor.

weekly.use_case: 글로벌 캠페인, 제작사, 에이전시 작업물 확인
weekly.codex_task: Monitor new campaign articles. Extract brand, agency, creative direction, media format, campaign insight.

weekly.use_case: 광고 소재 저장, 스와이프 파일, 팀 단위 소재 관리
weekly.codex_task: Use as swipe-file destination if account access exists. Group saved ads by industry, funnel stage, and hook type.

weekly.use_case: 경쟁사 광고 소재, 장기 집행 광고, 신규 소재 탐색
weekly.codex_task: Find long-running ads and identify likely winning angles. Classify hooks, offers, thumbnails, CTA.

weekly.use_case: Facebook, TikTok, 이커머스 광고 스파이툴
weekly.codex_task: Search ads by keyword, country, platform, industry. Export ad examples and classify by performance signal if available.

weekly.use_case: TikTok, Facebook, TikTok Shop 광고 소재 확인
weekly.codex_task: Monitor TikTok-style commerce ads. Extract product angle, hook, video structure, offer, CTA.

weekly.use_case: 디지털 광고 시장, 소비자, 미디어 리포트 확인
weekly.codex_task: Collect new reports. Extract market data, consumer insight, media trend, useful statistics for proposals.

weekly.use_case: 디지털 광고 시장, 미디어 트렌드, 광고상품 업데이트 확인
weekly.codex_task: Monitor new reports. Extract key trend keywords, media changes, ad product opportunities, proposal-ready numbers.

weekly.use_case: PR, 커뮤니케이션, 브랜드 리스크, 광고 이슈 확인
weekly.codex_task: Monitor PR and communication cases. Extract brand risk, crisis pattern, messaging insight.

weekly.use_case: 국내 쇼핑 카테고리별 클릭량, 성별·연령·기기별 경향 확인
weekly.codex_task: Analyze shopping category trends by age, gender, device. Extract category opportunity and seasonal demand.

weekly.use_case: 소셜 언급량, 연관어, 감성 분석 확인
weekly.codex_task: Track brand/category keywords. Extract mention volume, related words, sentiment, copywriting clues.

weekly.use_case: Z세대, 1020·2030 소비자 감성, 밈, 비주얼 트렌드 확인
weekly.codex_task: Collect Gen Z trend articles. Extract slang, meme, lifestyle insight, content angle.

weekly.use_case: 20대·Z세대 소비자 조사, 라이프스타일 인사이트 확인
weekly.codex_task: Collect research articles and reports. Extract target insight and proposal-friendly summary.

weekly.use_case: 카카오모먼트, 키워드광고, 광고상품 사례 및 가이드 확인
weekly.codex_task: Collect new insights and guides. Summarize Kakao ad product usage, targeting, creative examples.

weekly.use_case: Google Ads, AI 광고, 커머스 광고 업데이트 확인
weekly.codex_task: Monitor Google Ads announcements. Extract new features, AI tools, campaign types, measurement changes.

weekly.use_case: 소비자 인사이트, 검색·유튜브·커머스 트렌드 확인
weekly.codex_task: Collect consumer and marketing insight articles. Extract statistics, strategy suggestions, funnel implications.

weekly.use_case: Facebook, Instagram, Messenger 광고 업데이트 확인
weekly.codex_task: Monitor Meta ad product updates. Extract new tools, case studies, creative recommendations, policy changes.

weekly.use_case: TikTok 광고 사례, 숏폼 광고 가이드, 크리에이티브 트렌드 확인
weekly.codex_task: Collect TikTok business blog updates. Extract creative guidance, ad product changes, successful campaign structures.

weekly.use_case: 글로벌 광고업계, 에이전시, 브랜드 캠페인 흐름 확인
weekly.codex_task: Monitor agency and brand campaign news. Summarize relevant ideas for Korean performance marketers.

weekly.use_case: 브랜드 전략, 마케팅 조직, 소비자 변화, 커뮤니티 마케팅 확인
weekly.codex_task: Collect strategic marketing articles. Extract brand strategy, measurement, consumer behavior insights.

weekly.use_case: 마케팅 효과, 캠페인 성과, 케이스 스터디, 벤치마크 자료 확인
weekly.codex_task: Collect available case studies and effectiveness insights. Extract evidence for proposals and strategy documents.

weekly.use_case: 글로벌 마케팅 실무자 고민, 트렌드, 전략 토론 확인
weekly.codex_task: Monitor top weekly discussions. Extract market sentiment, strategy debates, common pain points.

weekly.use_case: 그로스 마케팅, AI, 실험 기반 성장 전략 확인
weekly.codex_task: Collect growth marketing posts. Extract experiment ideas, funnel strategies, AI automation examples.

monthly.use_case: Bing 검색광고, AI 검색광고, CTV·쇼핑 광고 흐름 확인
monthly.codex_task: Monitor major Microsoft Advertising updates. Extract features relevant to search, shopping, AI, audience ads.
